ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Player's draft pick number */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Player's rookie year */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "team_color1" TEXT /* Team's primary color */,
  "team_color2" TEXT /* Team's secondary color */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Team's logo */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Team's stadium capacity */,
  "ownership_group" TEXT /* Team's ownership group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Game attendance */,
  "officials" TEXT /* List of game officials */,
  "broadcast_network" TEXT /* Network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points the player scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds the player had */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player made */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals the player had */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks the player had */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers the player committed */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the standing is for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the standing is for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins the team has */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses the team has */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Team's win percentage */,
  "games_behind" INTEGER /* Number of games behind the leading team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playerseasonstats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the player played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points the player scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds the player had */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player made */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals the player had */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks the player had */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers the player committed */,
  "field_goals_percentage" REAL /* Player's field goal percentage */,
  "three_pointers_percentage" REAL /* Player's three-point percentage */,
  "free_throws_percentage" REAL /* Player's free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playerseasonstats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playerseasonstats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is for */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Coach's years of experience */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Coach's win-loss record */,
  "coach_type" TEXT /* Type of coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award was given to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach the award was given to */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, Coach of the Year) */,
  "award_season" INTEGER /* Season in which the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that was picked */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Player's draft pick number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team involved in the trade */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team involved in the trade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that was traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade occurred */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., player for player, player for pick) */,
  "trade_value" INTEGER /* Value of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free agent */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that is a free agent */,
  "free_agent_date" TEXT /* Date the player became a free agent */,
  "free_agent_type" TEXT /* Type of free agent (e.g., unrestricted, restricted) */,
  "free_agent_status" TEXT /* Status of the free agent (e.g., signed, unsigned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_agents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playercontracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that signed the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that signed the player */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_value" INTEGER /* Value of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie contract, max contract) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playercontracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playercontracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player that earned the salary */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the salary was earned in */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Amount of the salary */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., base salary, signing bonus) */,
  "salary_status" TEXT /* Status of the salary (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that earned the salary */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the salary was earned in */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Amount of the salary */,
  "salary_cap" INTEGER /* Team's salary cap */,
  "luxury_tax" INTEGER /* Team's luxury tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_salaries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_salaries_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the arena is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id")
)
